content.text:
Build passes clean. Here's the final state: - **Next.js 16.2.4** installed with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, App Router, `src/` directory - **`src/app/page.tsx`** — minimal blank page with just `

schoolstack

` - **`src/app/layout.tsx`** — clean root layout, no Geist fonts, metadata updated - **`src/app/globals.css`** — single `@import "tailwindcss"` line - **`public/`** — default SVGs removed Run `npm run dev` to start building.
